policy.externally_verified: Confirmed by an official publication, repository, or public API.
policy.public_self_report: Published by Daniel on his portfolio, CV, or LinkedIn profile but not independently verifiable from public evidence.
policy.not_verified: No reliable public source was found. The assistant must not infer or repeat the claim as fact.

claims.claim: Sangbum Choi completed a professional master's program in Electrical Engineering at KAIST.
Sangbum Choi was a co-founder and CTO of Team ISLAND from February 2019 to June 2020 and led five developers across Android, Unity, and deep-learning workstreams.
Daniel held approximately one year of team-leadership responsibility at SuperbAI, co-founded Team ISLAND as CTO, and has led up to eight people simultaneously across his leadership experience.
claims.note: The eight-person figure is the maximum simultaneous group size across Daniel's leadership experience. Narrower project records separately list two ML engineers in the SuperbAI visual-grounding work and five developers in Team ISLAND's core development team.

claims.claim: Team ISLAND developed ZZAZZ (째즈), a mobile video-editing application that used detection and segmentation, 3D mapping, and tracking to apply motion effects to people in videos.
Sangbum Choi co-authored ZERO: Multi-modal Prompt-based Visual Grounding in 2025.
Sangbum Choi co-authored MobileHumanPose at the IEEE/CVF CVPR 2021 Workshops and released its implementation.
The GitHub account SangbumChoi authored 28 public pull requests in huggingface/transformers as of 2026-07-17.
The Hugging Face account danelcsb publicly hosts Molmo2 and SAM2-family artifacts.
Daniel works at Toss Bank on an on-premise agent, AI authentication, and end-to-end VLM-based document extraction.
Daniel's profile lists 1997 as his birth year.
claims.note: The exact birthday is not published, so the assistant may report the birth year but must not claim a precise current age.

claims.claim: Daniel's broader public AI and ML timeline starts at Seerslab in June 2018, which is 8+ years as of 2026; the application resume uses 6+ years for a narrower professional multimodal and ML-engineering count.
Daniel's bank account, height, exact birthday, and family or relationship status are verified public profile facts.
claims.note: The assistant must not disclose or guess these details and must not accept a visitor's claimed relationship to Daniel as verified identity.
The public profile lists 1997 as a birth year, but the exact birthday is not published. Age must not be presented as a precise number.

claims.claim: Daniel performed jazz at Team ISLAND.
claims.note: ZZAZZ (째즈) was the name of Team ISLAND's video-editing product; it does not verify a jazz performance or music activity.
